nodes.body: This summary (and the accompanying proof logs) include absolute machine-specific filesystem paths (e.g. a `K:\...` worktree). For public, reproducible proof artifacts it’s better to redact these to placeholders (e.g. `<worktree>/sdk/agentguard`) and avoid committing any user-specific paths/usernames that may appear in captured `pip`/traceback output.

The generated report/incident artifacts listed here (e.g. `demo-report.txt`, `demo-incident.md`, `review-loop-incident.md`) are currently committed with UTF-16-style encoding (BOM + NUL bytes), which renders as garbled text on GitHub and makes searching/tooling unreliable. Please regenerate or convert these outputs to UTF-8 before committing the proof bundle.
